creator: okazaki@be.to
text:
Hi,

In the message <20000228031623.8304A18CA@shadow.blackdawn.com> 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com> wrote:

> Upgrade graphics/Mesa3 to new version (Mesa 3.1).
> Changes in port:
> 	4) Support GGI interface. I tested the build/link for this.

:-)

> +.if defined(WANT_GGI)
> +LIB_DEPENDS=	ggi.2:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/libggi
> +CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-ggi=${X11BASE}
>  .endif

Since libggi and libgii twin are installed under ${LOCALBASE},

.if defined(WANT_GGI)
LIB_DEPENDS=	ggi.2:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/libggi
CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-ggi=${LOCALBASE}.
.endif

are better to append to the port.
-- 
Tetsurou
